quick_skim.title: Estimating Supply Incrementality in Two-sided Marketplaces: A Causal Machine Learning Approach
quick_skim.abstract: In two-sided marketplaces with heterogeneous products, it is important to understand the causal relationship between additional supply and marketplace outcomes, such as the total quantity transacted or transaction value in the marketplace. This paper studies a causal machine learning approach to estimating this relationship across product segments. We use the Airbnb marketplace as an example, focusing on the impact of additional listing supply on total bookings, but the methodology applies to other two-sided marketplaces. Our approach combines double/debiased machine learning with a hierarchical Bayesian framework that leverages pre-existing knowledge as priors. We construct tractable and informative features for the model by leveraging measures of product segment similarity from the geospatial literature. We find that such a model provides plausible estimates of the marketplace returns to additional supply and strong out of sample performance.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: causal ML method for supply incrementality applicable to financial two-sided marketplaces
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 适用于金融双边市场的供应增量因果机器学习方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 适用于金融双边市场的供应增量因果机器学习方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 适用于金融双边市场的供应增量因果机器学习方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Presents a causal machine learning approach combining double/debiased ML with hierarchical Bayesian priors to estimate how additional supply affects outcomes in two-sided marketplaces, demonstrated on Airbnb but generalizable to financial platforms.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 双边市场中增加供应对总交易量的因果影响难以量化。本文结合双重/去偏机器学习与层次贝叶斯先验，提出一种因果推断方法，以Airbnb为例估计新增房源对预订量的影响，但该方法可推广至金融平台等双边市场。实验表明该方法优于传统回归，能有效识别增量效应。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 双边市场中增加供应对总交易量的因果影响难以量化。本文结合双重/去偏机器学习与层次贝叶斯先验，提出一种因果推断方法，以Airbnb为例估计新增房源对预订量的影响，但该方法可推广至金融平台等双边市场。实验表明该方法优于传统回归，能有效识别增量效应。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: applications of artificial intelligence in finance

quick_skim.title: StateFlow: Dual-State Recurrent Modeling for Long-Horizon Time Series Forecasting
quick_skim.abstract: Long-horizon multivariate time series forecasting (LTSF) remains challenging due to non-stationarity, regime shifts, and error accumulation. The Variability-Aware Recursive Neural Network (VARNN) is designed to track such variability by maintaining a residual-memory state driven by one-step prediction errors. However, its original formulation is limited to one-step sequence regression and does not directly support multi-step forecasting. In this work, we extend VARNN to long-horizon forecasting and introduce StateFlow, a recurrent forecasting framework that uses VARNN as a dual-state recurrent backbone to capture two complementary signals from the lookback sequence: a hidden-state trajectory representing primary temporal dynamics, including trend, seasonality, level changes, and recurring patterns, and a residual-memory trajectory representing structured local prediction deviations, driven from a nonlinear recurrent transformation of errors between one-step base predictions and observed values. A chunk-based decoder separately summarizes these trajectories and maps them to the future horizon for direct multi-step forecasting. We further employ a two-stage optimization strategy that first trains the VARNN encoder through a one-step base prediction objective to optimize the internal representations over the lookback sequence, and then trains a horizon-specific decoder for direct multi-step forecasting. Experiments on standard LTSF benchmarks show that StateFlow achieves competitive performance against strong linear, recurrent, convolutional, and Transformer-based baselines while preserving linear recurrent encoding and a compact model design.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: long-horizon time series forecasting method applicable to stock market analysis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 可用于股市分析的长期时间序列预测方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 可用于股市分析的长期时间序列预测方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 可用于股市分析的长期时间序列预测方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: StateFlow extends VARNN to long-horizon forecasting using dual-state recurrent modeling, capturing temporal dynamics and variability, with potential application to financial time series.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对长期时间序列预测中非平稳性和误差累积问题，提出StateFlow框架，基于VARNN双状态循环建模，同时捕捉主要时间动态和可变性信号。虽然未直接应用于金融数据，但其方法可迁移至股票市场分析等金融时间序列任务，具有方法论桥接价值。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对长期时间序列预测中非平稳性和误差累积问题，提出StateFlow框架，基于VARNN双状态循环建模，同时捕捉主要时间动态和可变性信号。虽然未直接应用于金融数据，但其方法可迁移至股票市场分析等金融时间序列任务，具有方法论桥接价值。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: deep learning models for stock market analysis

quick_skim.title: Quantum-Informed Portfolio Selection: An End-to-End Pipeline Validated on Trapped-Ion Hardware with Real Market Data
quick_skim.abstract: Portfolio diversification - a cornerstone of modern investment management - can be formulated as a Maximum Independent Set (MIS) problem on asset correlation graphs. Solving this problem at scale is computationally challenging, motivating the exploration of quantum algorithms for practical financial optimization. We propose an end-to-end pipeline leveraging qReduMIS, a recursive hybrid quantum-classical algorithm. Rather than using quantum optimization to directly produce a final solution, qReduMIS leverages independent set measurements from the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) to identify frozen nodes - vertices likely to belong to optimal solutions - thereby guiding and unblocking subsequent (provably optimal) classical reductions on the remaining graph. We benchmark qReduMIS on real financial data from four major market indices with up to 225 assets, executing experiments on Quantinuum's 98-qubit trapped-ion Helios system, with QAOA circuits acting on kernels of up to 78 qubits and 1016 two-qubit gates. While standalone QAOA fails to find the optimal solution for two of the largest indices (S&P 100 and Nikkei 225), qReduMIS achieves success probabilities of $0.40$ and $0.95$, respectively, with average approximation ratios $\geq 0.96$ across all four indices. We perform a systematic benchmark on the Quantinuum H2-1 noisy emulator over 73 asset correlation graphs of varying size showing that, for $p=2$ QAOA layers, the optimal time-to-solution scaling exponent of qReduMIS is $3.2$ times smaller than that of standalone QAOA.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: quantum-classical pipeline for portfolio selection on real market data
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于实际市场数据的量子-经典投资组合选择流水线
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于实际市场数据的量子-经典投资组合选择流水线
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于实际市场数据的量子-经典投资组合选择流水线
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Hybrid quantum-classical algorithm for maximum independent set formulation of portfolio diversification, validated on trapped-ion hardware with real market data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文将投资组合多样化问题建模为资产相关图上的最大独立集问题，并提出qReduMIS混合量子-经典算法。利用QAOA识别冻结节点递归求解，在离子阱硬件上使用真实市场数据验证，展示了量子计算在金融优化中的潜力，但方法非深度学习，与智能投顾需求部分相关。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文将投资组合多样化问题建模为资产相关图上的最大独立集问题，并提出qReduMIS混合量子-经典算法。利用QAOA识别冻结节点递归求解，在离子阱硬件上使用真实市场数据验证，展示了量子计算在金融优化中的潜力，但方法非深度学习，与智能投顾需求部分相关。

quick_skim.title: Autorelevance function and other feature relevance measures for univariate time series
quick_skim.abstract: We propose a model agnostic methodology to measure lag relevance in machine learning forecasting models applied to univariate time series. Particularly, we are working in the context of time series using the frameworks of Ghost variables and Shapley values, together with additive importance measures, to introduce the auto-relevance and partial auto-relevance functions as the lag importance values. Additionally, we propose a novel method to replace absent features in coalition based methods with a one step forecast from the same model. We evaluate these proposals under different simulations and real data cases. This combined framework perspective is particularly suitable for time series. In addition, to show our discoveries we use a pull of models from the seasonal ARMA family and recurrent neural networks. We found that the calculated relevance measures successfully demonstrate the expected lag structure in almost all cases.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: feature relevance for time series, applicable to stock market
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 时间序列特征相关性，可应用于股票市场
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 时间序列特征相关性，可应用于股票市场
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 时间序列特征相关性，可应用于股票市场
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces auto-relevance and partial auto-relevance functions for measuring lag importance in time series forecasting, applicable to financial market analysis.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对时间序列预测中滞后特征重要性评估问题，基于Ghost变量和Shapley值提出了自相关与偏自相关函数来衡量滞后重要性，并设计了替代缺失特征的方法。在模拟和真实数据上验证了有效性，为股票市场等金融时间序列分析提供了模型无关的特征选择工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对时间序列预测中滞后特征重要性评估问题，基于Ghost变量和Shapley值提出了自相关与偏自相关函数来衡量滞后重要性，并设计了替代缺失特征的方法。在模拟和真实数据上验证了有效性，为股票市场等金融时间序列分析提供了模型无关的特征选择工具。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: deep learning models for stock market analysis
